title: B.S. Computer Science — University of Indianapolis
detail: Graduated May 2026. Concentration in Software Engineering. Four years of project work spanning full-stack development, machine learning, AI tooling, and cryptography.

title: KSPT Curricular Command Center
detail: Built a SvelteKit 2 + Firebase + Gemini AI application that replaced a manual spreadsheet process for mapping DPT curriculum to 93 CAPTE accreditation standards. Delivered across five Agile sprints with a five-person team.

title: n8n-to-Python Transpiler
detail: CLI tool that converts n8n visual automation workflows into standalone Python scripts via AST-based code generation, removing the n8n runtime dependency for production deployments.

title: Bluetooth Attendance
detail: Automated attendance tracking using Bluetooth proximity detection. Multi-threaded Python backend logs full-classroom records in under 30 seconds without interrupting the session.

title: Obesity Risk Prediction
detail: End-to-end ML pipeline on 2,111 records across 16 features. Trained and compared a Keras neural network (96% accuracy), KNN (95%), and Random Forest. Key predictors identified via chi-square analysis.

title: Password Manager — Selenium CI Suite
detail: Wrote end-to-end Selenium tests covering create, share, and retrieve flows for a collaborative password manager. Integrated merge-blocking CI via GitHub Actions.

title: WebVPython WASM Runner
detail: Open source contribution enabling VPython physics simulations to run fully in-browser via WebAssembly. Implemented screenshot capture using a secure postMessage inter-frame communication bridge.
